page_metadata.bioconda__summary: Exonerate - A generic tool for pairwise sequence comparison / alignment
page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: A tool for pairwise sequence alignment. it enables alignment for dna-dna and dna-protein pairs and also gapped and ungapped alignment.
page_metadata.biotools__summary: A tool for pairwise sequence alignment. It enables alignment for DNA-DNA and DNA-protein pairs and also gapped and ungapped alignment.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: A tool for pairwise sequence alignment. It enables alignment for DNA-DNA and DNA-protein pairs and also gapped and ungapped alignment.
page_metadata.galaxy__summary: Exonerate is a generic tool for pairwise sequence comparison.
page_metadata.galaxy__bio_tools_summary: A tool for pairwise sequence alignment. It enables alignment for DNA-DNA and DNA-protein pairs and also gapped and ungapped alignment.
